summary: The diff implements a comprehensive terminal/CMD aesthetic transformation of the portfolio. All major requirements are addressed: monospace fonts, dark terminal colors, CMD-style prompts, ASCII borders, typing animations, Matrix-style falling characters, scanline overlay, and CMD command formatting. The implementation is thorough and well-structured.

hallucinated_features.description: Implementation of specific UTM tracking parameters in Footer component for caffeine.ai attribution link
hallucinated_features.reason: The BuildRequest mentions preserving existing content and functionality but does not request adding UTM tracking parameters or modifying attribution links with tracking codes
